message:
fix(tui): resolve Theme reference and import errors blocking TUI test suite

- Unify all render function signatures to &Theme (consistent pass-by-ref)
- Add SeverityFilter and Overlay imports to render.rs test module
- Add navigation breadcrumb trail and hint bar to overview/ballast screens
- Add 11 new render tests for navigation and command palette overlay
- Fix alphabetical ordering of test module registration in mod.rs

These changes unblock `cargo test --features tui` which was failing with
12+ type-mismatch and undeclared-type errors across the render test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
